analysis.reasoning: Core message: China announces its election to the UN Human Rights Council (2021–2023), thanks UN members, and pledges to work with others to promote and protect human rights. Evaluation per narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not referenced; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—emphasizes cooperation with other members, multilateralism, and advancing human rights within the UN framework, projecting China as a constructive, law-abiding participant. CH3 (epic history): Not mentioned. CH4 (appropriate political system and honorable values): The tweet does not discuss domestic political system or values; focus is international role, so not applicable. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No claims about domestic achievements or leadership superiority. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
